creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
+++ This bug was initially created as a clone of Bug #195059 +++

Last commit was ports r337961 (a year ago). A few patches (e.g. ports r375777) land only per timeout but most are trivial under portmgr blanket. Currently, 15 ports are out of date. One update breaks consumers and the submitter is willing to assume responsibility, see bug 197233.

http://freshbsd.org/search?committer=dhn
http://portscout.freebsd.org/dhn@freebsd.org.html
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/buglist.cgi?quicksearch=assignee:dhn
